globalGate.wave: S1b-settings-complete: full 82-key settings.json coverage with typed editors. S1-S5 + Q1-Q4 + C1-C5 previously gated.

unitTests.note: 462 passed, 3 skipped, 0 failed - the FULL suite with no exclusions: the stray :4777 live gateway that broke the C-wave gate is gone, so orchestrator-integration skips by default as designed. The slice added 29 specs: the 11-spec mechanical catalog<->vendored-schema sync gate and 18 validator/assembly specs; settings IO specs reworked (autoMode migrated out of the bespoke fixture, schema-dropped keys demotion proven, whole-object sandbox patch sibling-preservation proven).

e2eAll.note: 30 passed, 3 skipped across ALL THREE viewport projects (desktop/tablet/mobile - stricter than the prior waves desktop-only gate). The 3 skips are the pre-existing unconditional armory-install.spec legacy skip. Includes the new S1b spec (search/match-count, structured rule add to disk, sandbox.enabled object-form flip to disk, enterprise collapse + banner + managed pill, hooks link, unset round-trip, no save button, zero console errors). Fixed forward: the C5 plugins spec consumed its seed and failed on tablet/mobile (never gated before) - now self-seeding.

verifyApp.via: the committed e2e suite + a read-only smoke of the REAL ~/.claude through the live :7777 app: 82 known rows render, the 165-rule allow list renders as structured rows, the 7 genuinely-bespoke keys sit in the Advanced passthrough, the suggestions feed is live, and the drift banner honestly flags real external edits

by: vision pass over s1b-settings-{top,permissions,enterprise,search,narrow}.png vs s1b-ref-{vault,armory}.png at 1440px + 1000px
designAudit.notes: Same shell language as Vault/Armory: paper theme, serif headings, .text inputs, ghost buttons, mono pills, banner.warn for the Enterprise honesty copy; responsive stacked nav under 1100px; no emoji; zero console errors while driving.

globalGate.everySliceVideoVerifiedNote: S1b earned its OWN verified walkthrough (9 beats, every frame vision-verified, run not flagged), as did Q2; C1-C5 stay covered by the verified consolidated video; S1/S2/S4 flow videos predate the walkthrough verification pipeline; S3/S5/Q1/Q3/Q4 are backend/CLI/docs slices with justified null videos. That historical state is unchanged and is the sole reason the project-wide verdict stays completed-with-blockers - the S1b wave itself has zero blockers.
blockers: HISTORICAL (project-wide video coverage): not every past slice has its own vision-verified video - S1/S2/S4 predate the pipeline, C1-C5 share one verified consolidated video, backend/CLI/docs slices have justified nulls. S1b and Q2 each have their own verified video.
Plugin INSTALL from a marketplace is NOT built (C5 scope decision, stands) - only uninstall ships; install stays with Claude Code /plugin.
MCP env/headers are written as PLAINTEXT to mcp.json (matches Claude Code format; vault routing remains a deferred enhancement).
File-primitive RENAME remains out of scope.
Cooperative-ownership caveat stands for settings/hooks/mcp/plugins: a RUNNING Claude Code may rewrite these files; the drift banner + reload-before-edit is the standing mitigation.

S1b manual-verification nuance: the spec asked for a hand edit of one nested sandbox field against the REAL ~/.claude; performed READ-ONLY smoke only (82 rows / 165 structured rules / bespoke passthrough / live suggestions verified on :7777) - autonomously mutating the user real settings.json was deliberately skipped; the identical write path is proven by e2e against the sandbox.
